title: Out of the 10 stocks, almost all showed positive profits. This is currently the most profitable scenario.
author: WinterTiny1563
selftext:
Recently, many people have asked me: Why are the price increases on the stocks you bought so exaggerated?

It's not because I'm smart. It's because many people simply didn't understand this round of AI bull market.

The real boom wasn't in the surface-level technology stocks, but rather in the underlying aspects: chips, computing power, data centers, and AI infrastructure.

Take a look at my recent holdings:

APLX +103%

WULF +91%

DOCN +90%

NVTS +68%

IREX +68%

ALAB +54%
